title: Section 38
content: 1* * * * (2) 2*** 3*** casual vacancies in 4[any office or in any authority] shall be filled up by the authority which has power to appoint to the office or authority 5***.
footnote: 1. Sub-section (1) omitted by s. 28, ibid. 2. The words, brackets and figures "Subject to the provisions of sub-section (3) of section 18," omitted by Act 34 of 1972, s. 30 (w.e.f. 17-6-1972). 3. The word "other" omitted by Act 62 of 1951, s. 28. 4. Subs. by s. 28, ibid., for "any office of any authority". 5. Certain words omitted by Act 19 of 1965, s. 8. 12.
